name: Kajabi Creator
payoutModel: Creators keep 100% of revenue. Payment processing: 2.9%+$0.30/transaction

name: Coursera Instructor
payoutModel: Revenue share; Guided Project instructors earn per completion; institutional partners negotiate
notes: Primarily for Guided Projects for indie creators; full courses need institutional partnership

name: LinkedIn Learning Instructor
notes: Competitive selection, need strong professional expertise

name: Thinkific Creator
payoutModel: Creators keep 100% revenue; 0-5% transaction fee depending on plan

name: Dribbble Marketplace
payoutModel: ~50% of sale price on digital assets sold

name: Discord Server Subscriptions
payoutModel: 90% of subscription revenue to creator; 10% to Discord
notes: Need server in good standing, eligibility requirements

name: Steam Developer Program
notes: $100 submission fee per game (recouped at $1000 sales)

name: Itch.io Creator
payoutModel: Developer sets their own revenue split; default 10% to itch.io, adjustable to 0-100%

name: TuneCore Music Distribution
payoutModel: 100% of streaming royalties; annual subscription fee per release ($14.99 single, $29.99 album)
notes: Flat annual fee model, keep all royalties

name: CD Baby Music Distribution
payoutModel: 91% of net royalties; one-time fee per release ($9.95 single, $29 album)

name: Audiomack AMP
payoutModel: 50% of streaming revenue share; need 50K+ monthly plays to qualify

name: 500px Licensing
payoutModel: 30% of net sales for non-exclusive; 60% for exclusive; marketplace sales via Getty/VCG
notes: Free account, optional paid Pro plan

name: WordPress ThemeForest Author
payoutModel: 50-87.5% of theme sales; exclusive authors earn higher rates
notes: Part of Envato marketplace — separate from Envato Elements

name: AppSumo Marketplace Partner
payoutModel: 70% of revenue on lifetime deals; $55M+ paid to partners total
notes: For SaaS/digital product makers; lifetime deal model

name: Podia Creator
payoutModel: Creators keep 95-100% of sales; 8% transaction fee on free plan, 0% on paid

name: Threadless Artist Shop
payoutModel: Artists set own prices on Artist Shops (keep profit margin); marketplace listings earn 10% royalty
